functional.title: Business Process Overview
functional.content:
# Business Requirements Document

## 1. Executive Summary
This document outlines the core business processes and operational requirements for the current project.

## 2. Key Objectives
- Streamline data entry workflows.
- Enhance reporting accuracy across departments.
- Improve user experience for internal stakeholders.

## 3. Scope of Work
- Analysis of existing data structures.
- Mapping of current business logic.
- Identification of potential automation opportunities.

technical.title: System Architecture Design
technical.content:
# Technical Specification

## 1. Infrastructure Overview
The system is designed to be highly available and scalable using modern cloud-native principles.

## 2. Component Architecture
- API Gateway: Handles all incoming requests and routing.
- Microservices: Independent services for specific business domains.
- Database: Distributed data store with high consistency.

## 3. Security & Compliance
- End-to-end encryption for sensitive data.
- Role-based access control (RBAC) for all system components.
